SELECT arrayPopBack(arr) AS result FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayPopBack(arrayPopBack(arr)) AS result FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayPopBack([arrayPopBack([1, 2, 3])]) AS res FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arr FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayPopBack(arr) != arr;
SELECT arr, arrayPopBack(arr) AS modified_arr FROM test_arrays WHERE length(arr) > 0;
SELECT arrayPopBack(arr) AS last_element, count(*) FROM test_arrays GROUP BY last_element;
SELECT arrayPopBack(arr) AS last_element FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays WHERE arr != []);
CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT t1.id, arrayPopBack(t1.arr) AS modified_arr FROM test_table1 t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT t1.id, arrayPopBack(arrayPopBack(t1.arr)) AS double_modified FROM test_table1 t1;
SELECT t1.id, arrayPopBack(t1.arr) AS arr_after_pop FROM test_table1 t1 WHERE length(t1.arr) > 0;
